meta_description: Manufacturing-as-a-Service (MaaS) applies the 'as-a-service' model, made famous by software and cloud computing, to the manufacturing industry. By leveraging digital platforms, MaaS connects businesses to a distributed solution for advanced manufacturing resources, offering on-demand access to scalable, flexible, and efficient production capabilities.

sections.heading: What is Manufacturing-as-a-Service (MaaS)?
sections.text: What is Manufacturing-as-a-Service (MaaS)? Manufacturing-as-a-Service (MaaS) applies the 'as-a-service' model, made famous by software and cloud computing, to the manufacturing industry. By leveraging digital platforms, MaaS connects businesses to a distributed solution for advanced manufacturing resources, offering on-demand access to scalable, flexible, and efficient production capabilities.

sections.heading: Introduction to Manufacturing-as-a-Service (MaaS)Â
sections.text: What is Manufacturing-as-a-Service (MaaS)?Â Â Manufacturing-as-a-Service (MaaS) applies the 'as-a-service' model, made famous by software and cloud computing, to the manufacturing industry. By leveraging digital platforms, MaaS connects businesses to a distributed solution for advanced manufacturing resources, offering on-demand access to scalable, flexible, and efficient production capabilities.Â Introduction to Manufacturing-as-a-Service (MaaS)Â While ride-scheduling and food-delivery services take advantage of machine-learning and advanced algorithms to automate the bottlenecks, it is an odd anachronism that engineers often have to pick up the phone and call around to find a reliable fac...
